'''Joshua Fardon''' is a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] that portrayed [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in the [[Return of the Jedi (radio)|''Return of the Jedi'' radio play]]<ref name="RotJ Radio" /> and in the [[1997]] [[Star Wars Legends|legends]] read-along storybooks of the [[Original trilogy]]. The same audio was later used in the [[2015]] [[canon]] read-along storybooks of the Original trilogy. <ref name="ANH">''[[A New Hope Read-Along]]''</ref>
